top_signals.title: US Launches New Strikes on Iran After Troops Killed
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran engaged in a quickening series of tit-for-tat attacks, with the American military carrying out its ninth consecutive night of strikes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spain outplay Messi’s Argentina to reach World Cup summit
top_signals.summary: Tournament’s best team wins one-sided final 1-0 and claims clutch of individual prizes
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
